description: Fixed live labeller layers: read-only automatic labels, shared manual labels, and the current user's personal manual layer.
sql: SELECT * FROM (WITH fixed_layers AS (SELECT 'system:model:platinum_substage_labels' AS id, 'Automatic Substage Labels' AS name, 'System generated · Read-only' AS description, 'platinum_substage_labels' AS rule_concept_id, :labeler_id AS labeler_id, :well_name AS well_name, 'system-model' AS owner_email, 'system-model' AS created_by_email, 'system-model' AS updated_by_email, 'model' AS source_type, false AS is_editable, false AS can_edit, -100 AS display_order, true AS is_visible_default, 'active' AS status WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM featurestore:merged_platinum_labels_v1 p WHERE p.name = :well_name AND p.substage IS NOT NULL AND p.substage <> 'NA' LIMIT 1) UNION ALL SELECT 'manual:shared' AS id, 'Manual' AS name, 'Shared manual layer · Editable by everyone' AS description, 'manual_shared' AS rule_concept_id, :labeler_id AS labeler_id, :well_name AS well_name, 'shared' AS owner_email, 'system' AS created_by_email, 'system' AS updated_by_email, 'user' AS source_type, true AS is_editable, true AS can_edit, 0 AS display_order, true AS is_visible_default, 'active' AS status UNION ALL SELECT 'manual:user:' || md5(CAST(:current_user_email AS TEXT)) AS id, 'Manual - ' || :current_user_email AS name, 'Personal manual layer · Editable only by you' AS description, 'manual_user_' || md5(CAST(:current_user_email AS TEXT)) AS rule_concept_id, :labeler_id AS labeler_id, :well_name AS well_name, :current_user_email AS owner_email, :current_user_email AS created_by_email, :current_user_email AS updated_by_email, 'user' AS source_type, true AS is_editable, true AS can_edit, 10 AS display_order, true AS is_visible_default, 'active' AS status) SELECT id, name, description, rule_concept_id, labeler_id, well_name, owner_email, created_by_email, updated_by_email, source_type, is_editable, can_edit, display_order, is_visible_default, status FROM fixed_layers ORDER BY display_order ASC, name ASC) q
